name: python3-matplotlib-inline
title: python3-matplotlib-inline
summary: Matplotlib backend for inline use in IPython and Jupyter
description:
Matplotlib backend for inline use in IPython and Jupyter
This provides support for displaying matplotlib plots in Jupyter notebooks
(and other frontends). This was previously part of IPython/ipykernel.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-matplotlib-inline because Matplotlib backend for inline use in IPython and Jupyter.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-matplotlib-inline as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-matplotlib-inline with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-matplotlib-inline --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
